meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Build Your First AI Project Today
content.seo_description: Overcome project paralysis with our Claude Code skills setup guide. Master Antigravity and Claude CLI to build professional apps as a student developer.
content.answer_block: Stop staring at empty IDEs. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform abstract ideas into production-ready codebases. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces architectural best practices, and accelerates your development velocity, allowing you to focus on building unique features rather than debugging structural foundations.
content.intro:
The blinking cursor on an empty screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the theoretical knowledge, but the gap between 'knowing how to code' and 'shipping a finished product' feels like an unbridgeable canyon. This is the student’s paradox: you have the skills, but lack the project roadmap to prove them.

Today, we close that gap. By mastering the synergy between Claude Code’s iterative intelligence and Antigravity’s rapid prototyping framework, you aren't just writing code—you are orchestrating a development environment that acts like a senior mentor sitting right over your shoulder.

steps.title: Initialize the Intelligent Environment
steps.description: Establish the project architecture using Antigravity to ensure your directory structure follows industry-standard patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable SaaS boilerplate structure using TypeScript, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS. Ensure modular folder separation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config set editor 'code' && claude init --template saas-starter

steps.title: Contextualize Your Project Goal
steps.description: Feed your project requirements into Claude Code to create a working roadmap that prevents scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these requirements and generate a feature-list priority matrix for a student-focused productivity tool.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Create a feature roadmap based on these requirements: [Insert Requirements]'

steps.title: Rapid Iterative Prototyping
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate core logic modules while Antigravity manages the state management boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a robust authentication service handler with error middleware and secure session management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the auth service logic in /services/auth.ts'

steps.title: Automated Testing & Validation
steps.description: Ensure your code is production-ready by automating unit tests for every new feature generated.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test suites for all API endpoints created in the previous step, covering edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Write and execute unit tests for all files in /services'

steps.title: Deployment Readiness Check
steps.description: Perform a final audit of your codebase to identify security vulnerabilities or performance bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the current codebase and suggest optimizations for production deployment.

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's '--verbose' flag to understand the reasoning behind its architectural decisions.
Keep your Antigravity prompts modular; break complex features into 'sub-tasks' to maintain high code quality.
Map your project milestones to GitHub commit history to build a verifiable, job-ready portfolio.
Always review Claude's generated code; treat it as a junior dev's pull request, not as final truth.
Utilize custom system prompts in Claude Code to enforce specific coding styles like clean architecture or functional programming.
content.next_steps: Once your first feature is live, document the process in a README.md file and deploy your app to Vercel or Railway to get your first user feedback loop started.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a student just learning—you are an AI-powered engineer building the future. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea and start shipping the one you have right now. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
